title: Measured-mechanics wave
notes: Reworked elemental advantage into its own damage bucket and split the machine-gun range bonus to the far band only, matching frame-counted recordings.
Snow White: Heavy Arms and Rapi: Red Hood re-modeled onto their measured in-window shots; Mint + Prika duet burst order fixed.
Accuracy board now sits at a ~0.95 median across 86 unit readings, with full-burst counts measured-exact on every graded team.
